query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Brasil%' OR address LIKE '%, SP,%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as full_address,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hours,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lat IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_coords
FROM establishments;
